[TITLE]: Blood Spots On Book Page - Boxist Photography / Sam Mugraby
[METADATA/INTRO]: In this closeup view, we focus on a fragment of an open page from an old book, its ancient and fragile nature evident in every detail. The page, likely made of aged parchment or paper, bears the weight of history...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: In this closeup view, we focus on a fragment of an open page from an old book, its ancient and fragile nature evident in every detail. The page, likely made of aged parchment or paper, bears the weight of history in its worn and yellowed appearance. Upon the page, dark, printed letters are visible, forming words and sentences that convey knowledge and meaning. The ink, once deep black, has faded with time, lending an antique charm to the text. However, what truly captures one’s attention are the ominous and striking bloodstains that mar the surface of the paper. The crimson stains appear irregular and haphazard, as though they were the result of a dramatic event long ago. The juxtaposition of the red blood against the faded black ink creates a vivid and haunting contrast. The presence of these bloodstains adds an element of mystery and intrigue to the page. It leaves the viewer wondering about the story behind them, as if this book had witnessed some dark and enigmatic event in the distant past. The page, with its printed letters and bloodstains, becomes a tangible relic of history, inviting curiosity and sparking the imagination.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2018-03-21
[TITLE]: Why is the Bible so Bloody? Jesus tells us why in Matthew 23:29-35
[METADATA/INTRO]: Lots of people wonder why the Bible is so bloody … that is, why there is so much violence and bloodshed in the Bible. (I am going to provide a brief explanation below, but if you want a more detailed...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: In Matthew 23:29-35, Jesus says that the Bible is so violent and bloody, because it reveals what we ourselves are doing in our own day. Jesus says that the Bible is so violent and bloody, not so that we can condemn the people of the past, but so that we can see how we ourselves participate in the same exact bloodshed and violence. 
 Jesus says that the Bible is so violent and bloody, not because it reveals what God is like (for only Jesus does that), but because it reveals what mankind is like. And therefore, what we are like.

[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Bloody Hand - Dictionary Art Print 
 This eerie bloody hand is printed on beautiful vintage dictionary paper. 
 These prints are definitely a conversation starter and look fabulous as a wall hanging. Each design is carefully selected and then printed on vintage dictionary paper giving it that beautiful golden color that only comes from age. Since we use real book pages some unevenness or spotting occurs, this only adds another layer to the print, making each one truly unique. 
 Dimensions: 10.5“ W x 8“ L x .0313“ H
